channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Coal stocks gain as Trump looks set to issue executive order calling for industry deals with military
item.description: Coal stocks advanced Wednesday following news that President Donald Trump plans to sign an executive order that could help the industry.

item.title: 20 stocks of companies that delivered a double dose of growth this earnings season
item.description: Companies in the S&P 500 achieving double-digit sales growth while improving profit margins include Palantir, Micron, Boeing and Alphabet.

item.title: Workers should watch out for the invisible financial risk of loving their jobs
item.description: Complacent high earners may be making tens of thousands of dollars less each year than they could be making elsewhere.

item.title: T-Mobile’s stock turns higher after earnings. Here’s what’s impressing Wall Street.
item.description: The company gave an upbeat forecast for service revenue at its investor day on Wednesday, overshadowing some weak points in its fourth-quarter results...

item.title: Moderna’s work developing seasonal vaccines is ‘risky’ under current FDA, analyst says
item.description: The biotech company said the FDA won’t review its flu vaccine, in the latest hit to mRNA development.

item.title: Citi, JPMorgan downgrade Mattel after earnings miss and disappointing guidance
item.description: Shares of Mattel plunged 28% in Wednesday's premarket trading session.

item.title: Robinhood tanks on revenue miss and ‘crypto jitters.’ Analysts say buy the dip
item.description: Most Wall Street analysts were prepared to look past a shortfall in revenue and focus instead on Robinhod's future growth profile.

item.title: The AI threat wrecked software stocks. Now financial stocks look next with LPL closing 8% lower
item.description: Financial services firms tanked after the launch of a new AI-powered tax planning tool that promises to do the work "within minutes."

item.title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Dick's, Netflix, Kingsoft, Robinhood & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

item.title: This stock got caught up in the software drawdown. Goldman says it’s insulated from AI threat
item.description: Goldman Sachs sees shares of Samsara rising about 30% from current levels.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
